name: salesforce-toolkit
description: Salesforce DX MCP wrapped as a plugin — read-only SOQL, macOS only (MCP declared in .mcp.json).

interface.shortDescription: Read-only Salesforce SOQL via the DX MCP
interface.longDescription: Ask a business question in plain language and get Salesforce data back. The sf-query skill composes a SOQL string, runs it through the Salesforce DX MCP server (read-only run_soql_query), and renders the rows as a table or a narrative answer — list objects, filter and aggregate records, and traverse parent-child relationships. The MCP server is declared in .mcp.json, so Codex auto-registers it on `codex plugin add` (verified on 0.139.0). It still needs an authenticated Salesforce org; whether Codex resolves the ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} launcher path at run time and exposes the tool under the name the skill expects is not yet live-verified. macOS only.
defaultPrompt: Show me the open opportunities closing this quarter.
List the accounts created in the last 30 days.
Which contacts work at this account?
